module.description: Reusable internal automation rules with workflow lifecycle, queue/schedule execution, logs and version history.
module.permission_description: Create, activate, execute, version and restore internal automation rules.
module.navigation_hint: Internal rules for event bus, scheduler, queue and workflow.

index.title: Automation Rules
index.description: Internal rules over events, scheduler and the framework reusable workflow.
index.hero_lede: Internal rules over event bus, scheduler and reusable workflow, with real execution, persisted logs and version restore.

empty.title: No automation rules yet
empty.description: Create the first internal rule to react to framework events, schedules or workflow transitions.

index.search_placeholder: Search by name, slug, event or description

form_page.hero_lede_create: Connect existing events or schedules with real framework actions.
form_page.hero_lede_edit: Adjust trigger, conditions, and action payload while keeping workflow, logs, and versioning.

help.event_name: Required for event triggers. The wildcard listener consumes the framework event bus.
help.cron_expression: Required for schedule triggers. Uses the existing scheduler cadence.
help.condition_json: Map dotted paths to expected values. Example: {"payload.to_state":["approved","archived"]}
help.valid_from: Optional UTC window start. Leave blank to activate immediately once workflow is active.
help.valid_to: Optional UTC window end. When reached, the rule becomes expired without changing workflow state.

identity.title: Identity & trigger
identity.description: Define the operational name, real trigger and input signal of the rule.

conditions.title: Conditions
conditions.description: JSON conditions evaluated against the event context or manual execution.

action.title: Action
action.description: Reusable payload for notifications, workflow transitions or document rendering.

validation.rule_slug_unique: The rule slug must be unique.
validation.event_name_required: Event name is required for event-based rules.
validation.valid_from_invalid: Provide a valid start datetime or leave it blank.
validation.valid_to_invalid: Provide a valid end datetime or leave it blank.
validation.valid_to_after_start: End datetime must be later than start datetime.
validation.workflow_transition_requirements: Workflow transition actions require resource_key, record_id_path and transition.
validation.render_document_requires_template: Render document actions require a valid template_id.

messages.invalid_context_json: Provide valid JSON for the execution context.
messages.idempotency_required: Provide an Idempotency-Key header or idempotency_key field for this execution.

show.title: Automation Rule Detail
show.lede_fallback: Internal automation rule wired to the existing runtime buses.

workflow.title: Workflow actions
workflow.description: Real operation of the reusable lifecycle adopted by this rule.

execute.title: Execute rule
execute.description: Trigger the rule manually with JSON context, reusing the same real engine.

versions.title: Version history
versions.description: Persisted snapshots of reusable configuration with real restore.

logs.title: Execution log
logs.description: Real execution history by event, schedule or manual trigger.
